response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to first understand the motivations behind why people create and share false information. Some may do so for attention, others for financial gain, or simply out of boredom. Once you have identified the reasons, you can take steps to address the issue. Here are some strategies that I recommend:
